meaning: adj.过早衰老的,未老先衰的
examples: Summary: Common causes of senile and presenile vertigo in 100 cases were analysed and discussed.
Objective: to study the effect of Dunhuang Weicifang delaying senility to D-galactose presenile model mice.
Objective to supply a scientific basis for uniting standard of the reference value of Chinese presenile people's hematocrit.
